query:
-- Link all 5 Infinitea Trading Octane accounts to C9024
UPDATE octane_customer_links 
SET matchType = 'new_customer', matchConfidence = 100.00,
    internalCustomerExternalId = 'C9024', internalCustomerName = 'Infinitea Trading',
    matchNotes = 'New customer record C9024 created from Octane data — Infinitea Trading Pty Ltd'
WHERE octaneCustomerName = 'Infinitea Trading Pty Ltd' AND matchType = 'unmatched';

-- Link JOSHELLEY to C9025
UPDATE octane_customer_links 
SET matchType = 'new_customer', matchConfidence = 100.00,
    internalCustomerExternalId = 'C9025', internalCustomerName = 'JOSHELLEY',
    matchNotes = 'New customer record C9025 created from Octane data — JOSHELLEY PTY LTD'
WHERE octaneCustomerId = '527014';

-- Link Bel's Resto to C9026
UPDATE octane_customer_links 
SET matchType = 'new_customer', matchConfidence = 100.00,
    internalCustomerExternalId = 'C9026', internalCustomerName = "Bel's Resto",
    matchNotes = "New customer record C9026 created — Bel's Resto Pty Ltd (name had encoding issue in Octane)"
WHERE octaneCustomerId = '531913';

-- Verify all 11 are now resolved
SELECT COUNT(*) as stillUnmatched FROM octane_customer_links WHERE matchType IN ('none', 'unmatched');
